name: USS LCI(L)-195 (LCI(L)-195)
events: 20 Feb 1944 USS LCI(L)-195 (Lt.(jg) R.L. Leventhal, USNR) picks up 6 survivors of the American landing ship USS LST-348 that was torpedoed and sunk by German U-boat U-410 that day about 22 nautical miles southwest of Gaeta, Italy in position 40°57’N, 13°14’E.
